name: a-horde-o-bees
description: Claude Code plugins for agent discipline, tool workflows, and project tooling. Discipline plugins (writing, communication, testing, design) ship behavioral skills you invoke as `apply /<skill>`. Tool plugins (git, transcripts, pdf-plus) ship workflow CLIs. skill-authoring ships the meta-toolkit for authoring new skills. Add with no ref for dev channel (tracks main); add with `@vX.Y.Z` to pin to a stable release.

plugins.name: writing
plugins.description: Prose and artifact authoring discipline — apply concise-prose, description-authoring, markdown-authoring, process-flow-notation, reauthor, trigger-specificity at the matching authoring moment.

plugins.name: communication
plugins.description: Agent⇄user interaction discipline — apply honesty, principled-pushback, confirm-shared-intent at the matching interaction moment.

plugins.name: testing
plugins.description: Testing discipline — apply test-authoring, test-driven-development, test-maintenance, testing-decisions at the matching testing moment.

plugins.name: design
plugins.description: Engineering design discipline — apply 10 design principles (agent-first-interfaces, borrow-before-build, clean-break, composability, fix-foundations-not-symptoms, graceful-degradation, structure-as-documentation, workflow-vs-script, file-decomposition, progressive-disclosure) at the matching design moment.

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Git workflow plugin — commit, push, watch GitHub Actions, run a development checkpoint cycle, cut a tagged release. Includes the git skill (verbs) and the checkpoint orchestration skill.

plugins.name: transcripts
plugins.description: Query Claude Code session transcripts as structured data — projects, sessions, exchanges with time accounting, full chat content, and persistent per-exchange descriptions. Backed by SQLite ingested from ~/.claude/projects/.

plugins.name: pdf-plus
plugins.description: One-shot markdown→PDF rendering for single-page documents (resume, cover letter, recommendation letter) using a tuned visual style. Distinct from the base pdf skill which handles read/merge/split/OCR/forms.

plugins.name: skill-authoring
plugins.description: Meta-toolkit for authoring new skills. skill-composer composes from exemplar sources with drift tracking against pinned upstream commits; skill-creator creates from scratch via interview-driven dialogue layered on Anthropic's skill-creator. The rules skill manages always-on skill promotion via CLAUDE.md directives.
